hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command' < /dev/stdin); case "$CMD" in *'git checkout -b '*|*'git switch -c '*|*'git switch --create '*) echo 'BLOCK: Do not create branches directly. Pull latest main first (git pull), then use a worktree (EnterWorktree tool or using-git-worktrees skill).' >&2; exit 2;; esac
